text:
Market today: The tech and chip sectors remain firmly in the grip of the AI narrative, which is the primary driver for your portfolio. Broader market sentiment might see some minor jitters from a heat wave, but AI continues to be the core focus.

Your holdings: SOXL is a significant concern, down 28.7% and, as a leveraged ETF, its decay combined with trading on margin amplifies that pain. SPAL, another new leveraged ETF, is also in the red at -9.58% and needs close monitoring. QQQI is nearing its stop at -1.86%, flagged for a trim.

Watch: Keep a close eye on SMH; your scanner has a "BUY" setup at a lower entry than your current price, which could present an opportunity or a warning. Also, watch for any shifts in the overarching AI narrative.

Bottom line: Aggressively manage your leveraged positions and stay disciplined with your stops, especially given your margin exposure.
plays: SOXL: Consider tightening your stop or trimming SOXL given its deep drawdown and leveraged nature. Margin amplifies its decay.
QQQI: Respect the TRIM signal; if QQQI hits its 52 stop, exit to manage risk.
SMH: Watch for the scanner's BUY entry (586.43-584.71, stop 580.88) if you want to average down or re-enter on a dip, aligning with the positive chip sector outlook.
